title: TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 Out

detail.title: TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 Out
detail.short_info: TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 out at tgrjc.cgg.gov.in. Download Telangana Residential Junior Colleges CET admit card using reference number and DOB, check exam date 3 May 2026, timing 10 AM-12:30 PM and exam-day instructions here.

content.text: Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society (TREIS) has released the TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 for students appearing in the Telangana State Residential Junior Colleges Common Entrance Test. Candidates who submitted TSRJC CET 2026 application forms can now download their admit card from the official TGRJC CET portal tgrjc.cgg.gov.in using their reference number and date of birth. As per the official schedule, TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 is available online about one week before the entrance exam, which is scheduled to be held on 3 May 2026 from 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM.
Direct Link to Download TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026

links.text: Direct Link to Download TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026

headers: TSRJC CET 2026 (Telangana State Residential Junior Colleges Common Entrance Test)
rows: Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society (TREIS), Hyderabad
Released online about one week before exam
Reference Number / Candidate ID and Date of Birth

sections.heading: TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

content.text: TREIS has activated the TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 download link on the official TGRJC CET portal. Candidates must visit tgrjc.cgg.gov.in or tsrjdc.cgg.gov.in and use the hall ticket download link to access their TSRJC admit card 2026. The hall ticket is available only in online mode; no printed admit card is sent by post, and candidates must download and print it themselves before the exam date.

sections.heading: How To Download TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to download TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official Telangana Residential Junior Colleges CET portal at https://tgrjc.cgg.gov.in or http://tsrjdc.cgg.gov.in.
On the home page, click on the 'Download Hall Ticket' or 'TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026' link under the admissions/exam section.
On the hall ticket login page, enter your Reference Number / Candidate ID and Date of Birth in the specified fields.
Click on the 'Submit' or 'Get Hall Ticket' button to generate your TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026.
Check all details printed on the admit card such as your name, group (MPC/BPC/MEC), exam date, time and test centre address.
Download the hall ticket PDF and take a clear printout to carry to the examination centre.

content.text: If you face any technical issues while downloading the TSRJC hall ticket 2026, you should try again after some time or contact the technical helpdesk of CGG as mentioned on the portal.

sections.heading: TSRJC CET 2026 Exam Date, Timing And Pattern

content.text: TSRJC CET 2026 will be conducted on 3 May 2026 from 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM. The entrance test will be held in offline mode, with objective-type questions for a total of 150 marks, and the language of the question paper will be Telugu and English. The group-wise subjects are MPC (English, Mathematics, Physical Science), BPC (English, Biological Science, Physical Science) and MEC (English, Social Studies, Mathematics), each subject carrying 50 marks.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned On TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: The TSRJC hall ticket contains crucial information that must be checked carefully by candidates:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Reference number / candidate ID and group applied (MPC/BPC/MEC)
Exam name: TSRJC CET 2026
Exam date: 3 May 2026
Exam timing: 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM
Exam centre name and full address (city, district)
Instructions regarding reporting time, permitted items and conduct in exam hall

content.text: Any discrepancy in personal details, group or exam centre should be reported to TREIS/TSRJC authorities for clarification before the exam.

sections.heading: Documents Required With TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: On the TSRJC CET 2026 exam day, candidates must carry:

items: Printed copy of TSRJC CET Hall Ticket 2026
A valid ID proof or school ID card as specified in the instructions
Recent passport-size photograph (if asked to affix on attendance sheet or proforma)

content.text: No candidate will be allowed to appear for TSRJC CET 2026 without a valid hall ticket.
